---
title: "Economic Insights Blog"
listing:
  contents: posts/*.qmd
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  categories-description: ""
---

<section class="bg-gradient-to-r from-red-800 to-orange-600 text-white py-10 md:py-12">
  <div class="max-w-7xl mx-auto container-tight">
    <h1 class="text-2xl md:text-3xl font-bold">Economic Insights Blog</h1>
    <p class="mt-2 opacity-90 text-sm md:text-base">Development economics & data science analysis</p>
  </div>
</section>

<section class="py-8 md:py-16">
  <div class="max-w-4xl mx-auto container-tight">
    <h2 class="section-title">Latest Articles</h2>
  </div>
</section>
